description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular design with a matte black finish and numerous visible scratches and scuffs, suggesting heavy use or combat. The front is dominated by a striking T-shaped visor with a glowing blue tint, reminiscent of futuristic or sci-fi armor. The sides are reinforced with thick, layered panels and circular ear coverings, adding to its protective appearance. The rear of the helmet is solid and reinforced, with vertical ridges and a central raised section for added structural integrity. The surface is mostly smooth but marred by wear, giving it a rugged, battle-worn look. There are no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation openings, and the helmet appears to be constructed primarily from a hard composite material.
description: A matte black, battle-worn helmet with a glowing blue T-shaped visor and reinforced, angular panels. The surface is scratched and rugged, with no visible logos or graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent blue T-shaped visor and the most extensive surface scratching.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick side panels, circular ear covering, and the visor's blue glow.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the solid, reinforced back with vertical ridges and no visible openings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular structure and blue visor edge.
